facebook.caption: POV: you just landed in Phu Quoc with a wallet full of USD and zero dong. Don't panic. EXMoney Phu Quoc Night Market on 10 Đường Nguyễn Trãi has you covered. 4.9 stars from 41 reviews. Right next to the night market. Open when you actually need it. Sort your cash, hit the street food stalls. Tag your travel buddy who always forgets to exchange money.
facebook.video_caption: Landed with zero dong? Watch how fast this fix is. EXMoney at Đường Nguyễn Trãi, steps from the night market. 4.9 stars. In and out in minutes.

instagram.caption: POV: zero dong, night market in front of you. EXMoney on Đường Nguyễn Trãi. 4.9 stars. Problem solved. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Forgot to exchange money? This spot at Đường Nguyễn Trãi fixes that. 4.9 stars. Night market is right there.

tiktok.caption: POV: arrived in Phu Quoc with no dong. EXMoney Đường Nguyễn Trãi saves the night. 4.9★ #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocTips #VietnamTravel #TravelTips

video_script.hook: Zero dong. Night market. Now what?
scenes: Show crowded night market entrance at dusk
Cut to storefront sign: EXMoney Phu Quoc
Hands counting Vietnamese dong over counter

First street food purchase, cash in hand
